creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Security update fixing a number of issues.

From the announce message:

    Welcome to phpMyAdmin 2.9.1.1 which contains security fixes. See
    PMASA-2006-7 to PMASA-2006-9 on the security page of
    phpmyadmin.net.

See also: http://secunia.com/advisories/22969/
